basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT)
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) Teaching Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website. Have been announced through the SVNIT Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M.Phil in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry, Ph.D. in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry
qualification.details: Teaching Assistant (M.Sc./M.Phil): 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.Sc./ M. Phil in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry with a good academic record. Teaching Assistant (Ph.D.): Ph.D. in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry with a good academic record and 1st class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.Sc. (Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry).

salary_details.details: Teaching Assistant (M.Sc./M.Phil): Rs. 45,000/- Per Month Teaching Assistant (Ph.D.): Rs. 60,000/- Per Month
